title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Guided Harness Build
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a context and durable-memory policy while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
